title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at MedPlus - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MedPlus is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!
